Multi-mode stereo signal combiner. Amalgam lets you combine and

A multi-timbral, 4-operator FM oscillator with wavetable and
waveshaping capabilities.

Polyphonic, virtual analogue synthesiser voice complete with

An extensive wavetable oscillator that lets you explore
and rip apart wavetables in many different ways.

Topographic drum machine. This module is based on the original
Mutable Instruments (TM) Grids sequencer module. The Map and Density
controls explore and control the denisty of many pre-baked drum patterns.

Topographic drum machine. This module is based on the original
Mutable Instruments (TM) Grids sequencer module. The Map and Density
controls explore and control the denisty of many pre-baked drum patterns.

packages.name: Recorder
packages.description: VCV Recorder translated to browser-safe PCM capture with Rack-compatible gate, trigger, gain, mono/stereo, VU, and downloadable WAV output

packages.name: AD/ASR Envelope Generator
packages.description: Hybrid polyphonic Attack,Decay and Attack,Sustain,Release envelope generator with looping capabilities

packages.description: Clone up to 8 monophonic inputs and merge all channels into 1 polyphonic output

packages.name: Cross Fade 3D

packages.description: Add bypass and input/output mutes to the Linear Beats module

packages.description: Flexible logic gate processor suitable for both CV and audio applications

packages.name: Merge 4x2
packages.description: Compact and versatile polyphonic merge utility
